name: Verifi Chargeback Prevention API
what_it_does: Visa-owned chargeback prevention and dispute resolution platform with API — enabling merchants to respond to pre-dispute inquiries in real-time via Visa's Order Insight network, sharing transaction details with card issuers before chargebacks are filed, resolving disputes before they become chargebacks, and reducing chargeback ratios.
use_cases: Responding to Visa Order Insight inquiries with transaction data to prevent chargebacks
Integrating merchant transaction data with Verifi's CDRN for real-time dispute response
Querying prevention analytics to measure chargeback deflection rates
Automating transaction detail lookup and submission for pre-dispute resolution
Monitoring dispute inquiry volume and resolution rates for payment operations
not_for: Fighting chargebacks after they're filed (use Chargebacks911 for representment)
Non-Visa chargeback prevention (Verifi focuses on Visa; use Ethoca for Mastercard)
Transaction fraud scoring (use Kount or Riskified for pre-authorization risk)
best_when: A merchant with high Visa transaction volume wants to prevent chargebacks before they're filed by sharing transaction context with card issuers via Visa's Order Insight and CDRN pre-dispute resolution networks.
avoid_when: Your chargeback volume is primarily Mastercard (use Ethoca for MC prevention), you need post-chargeback representment, or you're below the chargeback threshold where prevention tooling ROI is unclear.

auth.notes: API key from Verifi merchant account. Bearer token auth. Merchant-scoped access. Webhook for Order Insight inquiries requiring merchant response. PCI DSS compliance required. Acquired by Visa (2019) — now part of Visa Resolve Online. Visa network access for real-time pre-dispute resolution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Contact sales; pricing based on transaction volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction and subscription pricing; contact sales
pricing.notes: Los Angeles-based company. Founded 2004. Acquired by Visa (2019). Now part of Visa's merchant services ecosystem. Order Insight (formerly Order Insight): real-time transaction detail sharing with issuers. CDRN (Cardholder Dispute Resolution Network): pre-dispute resolution before chargeback filing. Compelling Evidence 3.0 support. Visa relationship provides unique network access unavailable to independent vendors.

performance.rate_limits: Per merchant volume limits per Visa contract

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for Order Insight inquiry response and CDRN case management. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation. Real-time response to inquiries is time-sensitive — SLA for response to prevent chargeback. Visa network integration requires merchant acquirer coordination. Webhook for real-time inquiry notifications.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Inquiry reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period. Case reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Order Insight responses are time-sensitive — late responses result in chargeback filing
Visa-owned — integration through Visa acquiring bank relationship required
PCI DSS compliance mandatory for transaction data sharing
CDRN requires merchant acquirer to participate in the network
Mastercard disputes not covered — use Ethoca for MC network prevention

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI DSS and SOC2 compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Cardholder transaction data is PCI DSS in-scope — implement appropriate compliance controls. Visa ownership brings payment network security standards. Pre-dispute resolution requires handling sensitive dispute correspondence.
